title: Evolution of Enums to FAIR Coded Values
description: This example demonstrates various ways to represent categorical data, from standard JSON Schema enums to shared FAIR-annotated response domains mapped to external SKOS ontologies.

SimpleSharedDomain.title: Simple Shared Response Domain
SimpleSharedDomain.description: A standard JSON Schema way to associate labels with codes once and reuse them.

FairSharedDomain.title: FAIR Shared Response Domain
FairSharedDomain.description: An extended domain using FAIR vocabularies for multilingual support and semantic mapping.

SkosNutsDomain.title: SKOS Mapped NUTS Domain
SkosNutsDomain.description: A domain mapped to an external SKOS ConceptScheme (NUTS Regions).

standard_enum.title: 1. Standard Enum
standard_enum.description: Simplest approach. Validates against a list, but has no place for labels.

inline_oneof.title: 2. Inline oneOf (Standard)
inline_oneof.description: Standard JSON Schema replacement for enum that allows associating a label (title) with each value.

shared_standard_1.title: 3a. Shared Domain (Usage 1)
shared_standard_1.description: This variable reuses a standard definition. If the domain changes, you only update it once in $defs.

shared_standard_2.title: 3b. Shared Domain (Usage 2)
shared_standard_2.description: Another variable sharing the exact same codes and labels.

fair_usage_1.title: 4a. FAIR Shared Domain (Usage 1)
fair_usage_1.description: Uses the FAIR dialect to provide multilingual labels and semantic concept references.
fair_usage_1.fair:label: Current Satisfaction

fair_usage_2.title: 4b. FAIR Shared Domain (Usage 2)
fair_usage_2.description: The same FAIR domain used in a different context. Note how this property has its own local FAIR label while inheriting the multilingual codes.
fair_usage_2.fair:label: Future Intent

skos_usage_1.title: 5a. SKOS External Mapping (Residence)
skos_usage_1.description: Variable mapped to an official external SKOS classification (NUTS regions).
skos_usage_1.fair:label: Region of Residence

skos_usage_2.title: 5b. SKOS External Mapping (Birth)
skos_usage_2.description: The same official SKOS classification reused for a different variable.
skos_usage_2.fair:label: Region of Birth
